rationale: Deprecating a legacy Java API method; internal API cleanup with no spec behavior involved.
Javadoc correction for updateMulti; documentation fix, no spec rule violated.
Removing deprecated WriteResult.getLastConcern method; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Removing deprecated ReadPreference DBObject tag methods; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Removing deprecated MongoException$DuplicateKey constructor; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Removing MongoServerSelectionException; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Removing deprecated WriteConcern.getCommand method; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Removing deprecated MongoException(BSONObject) constructor; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Removing CommandFailureException construct; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Removing deprecated MongoInterruptedException constructor; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Removing CommandResult.getServerUsed; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Removing internal-only ServerError class from public API; API cleanup, no spec behavior.
Removing CommandResult-related methods on WriteConcernException; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Deprecating DBObject-based ReadPreference tag methods; API refactor introducing TagSet, no spec rule violated.
Deprecating WriteConcern.continueOnError; API design cleanup, orthogonality concern, not a spec violation.
Adding boolean continueOnError parameter to insert methods to prepare for deprecation; API ergonomics, no spec rule.
Removing previously deprecated WriteConcern.continueOnError; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Replacing Tags with TagSet/Tag in ReadPreference; internal API refactor, no spec behavior changed.
Adding missing test coverage for duplicate key on unique index creation; test gap, not a spec nonconformance.
Deprecating MapReduceCommand.addExtraOption; API cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
Removing deprecated MapReduceCommand.addExtraOption; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Adding type-safe jsMode setter to MapReduceCommand; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
Connection multiplexing architectural improvement; internal implementation feature, no specific spec rule.
Javadoc references wrong command name (addUser vs createUser); documentation fix, no spec behavior.
User expects exception for non-existent field index; MongoDB intentionally allows this, resolved as expected behavior.
Missing createIndex(spec, name, unique) overload for migration ease; API ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
Connection string spec requires wtimeoutMS; driver accepted wtimeout instead, deviating from documented spec parameter name.
Extended JSON spec requires $numberLong value to be quoted string; driver emitted unquoted number, breaking round-trip.
Javadoc incorrectly says getCollection creates the collection; documentation fix, no spec behavior involved.
Removing MapReduceOutput.serverUsed property; API cleanup for 3.0.0, no spec behavior.
Deprecating MapReduceOutput.serverUsed property; API cleanup, no spec behavior.
Adding count hint support added in MongoDB 2.6; new feature addition, no prior spec rule violated.
Driver incorrectly rejects positional operator 'array.$.field' key with dot; internal key validation bug, no spec rule.
ThreadLocal anonymous subclass prevents classloader GC; JVM memory leak, implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Deprecating internal StringRangeSet class; API cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
Replacing heartbeatConnectRetryFrequency with minHeartbeatFrequency; SDAM-adjacent API rename, no spec rule directly contradicted.
Deprecating no-longer-configurable heartbeatThreadCount; API cleanup, no spec behavior.
Deprecating heartbeatConnectRetryFrequency in favor of minHeartbeatFrequency; API cleanup, no spec rule directly violated.
Removing heartbeatThreadCount for 3.0.0; API cleanup, no spec behavior.
Auth spec requires mechanism properties to be case-insensitive; driver distinguished SERVICE_NAME from service_name, violating spec.
Removing deprecated StringRangeSet for 3.0.0; API cleanup, no spec behavior.
Making RawBsonDocument extend BsonDocument; internal type hierarchy refactor, no spec rule violated.
SCRAM spec requires cryptographically secure random nonce; driver used java.util.Random, violating security requirement.
Changing UpdateRequest.isMulti default to true; internal API default change, description too thin to confirm spec rule.
Merging ReplaceOperation into UpdateOperation; internal refactor to enable mixed batching, no spec rule violated.
Extended JSON spec defines $code/$scope structure for CodeWithScope; JsonReader failed to parse it correctly.
findOne by _id did not apply read preference to mongos; server selection spec requires read preference on all reads.
Making CommandResult.getResponse generic with Decoder; internal API type-safety improvement, no spec rule.
Getting started guide references deprecated DB.authenticate; documentation fix, no spec behavior.
continueOnError flag not working on bulk insert; description too thin, resolved quickly, likely user error or trivial fix.
